dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4477 IS: Davis-Bacon Repeal Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Lee (for himself, Mr. Cruz, Mr. Scott of South Carolina, Mr. Johnson, Mr. Lankford, Mrs. Britt, Mr. Budd, Ms. Ernst, and Mr. Scott of Florida) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions

form.official-title: To repeal the wage requirements of the Davis-Bacon Act.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Davis-Bacon Repeal Act.

subsection.text: Subchapter IV of chapter 31 of title 40, United States Code, is repealed.
Any reference in any law or a requirement under subchapter IV of chapter 31 of title 40, United States Code, shall be null and void.

section.text: Section 2, and the amendment made by such section, shall take effect 30 days after the date of enactment of this Act but shall not affect any contract that is—

paragraph.text: in existence on the date that is 30 days after such date of enactment; or
made pursuant to an invitation for bids outstanding on the date that is 30 days after such date of enactment.
